mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_task WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collect_task ( task_name, data_source_id, data_source_name, target_data_source_id, target_data_source_name, table_name, target_table_name, collect_mode, custom_sql, incremental_field, incremental_type, last_collect_value, field_mapping, transform_rules, batch_size, auto_create_table, status, schedule_enabled, cron_expression, schedule_description, execute_count, success_count, fail_count, max_retry_count, retry_interval, create_time ) VALUES ( #{taskName}, #{dataSourceId}, #{dataSourceName}, #{targetDataSourceId}, #{targetDataSourceName}, #{tableName}, #{targetTableName}, #{collectMode}, #{customSql}, #{incrementalField}, #{incrementalType}, #{lastCollectValue}, #{fieldMapping}, #{transformRules}, #{batchSize}, #{autoCreateTable}, #{status}, #{scheduleEnabled}, #{cronExpression}, #{scheduleDescription}, 0, 0, 0, #{maxRetryCount}, #{retryInterval}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM collect_task WHERE schedule_enabled = 1 AND next_execute_time IS NOT NULL AND next_execute_time <= NOW() AND status != 'running' ORDER BY next_execute_time ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM collect_task WHERE schedule_enabled = 1 AND cron_expression IS NOT NULL AND cron_expression != '' AND status = 'running'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_task WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{date}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_task WHERE YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collect_task WHERE status = #{status}
